title: GQ Terminal: a Python interface for GQ GMC geiger counters
description: A Python library and command-line tool for communicating with GQ GMC geiger counters (GMC-280, GMC-300, GMC-320, GMC-500, GMC-600) over serial using the GQ-RFC1201 protocol. Supports real-time CPS/CPM monitoring, configuration access, historical data retrieval, and CSV logging.
